Recognition

Awards and achievements that reflect our commitment to excellence.

Excellence Award

2024

Recognized for outstanding performance and innovation.

Awarded by: Industry Association

Best Team Award

2024

Awarded for exceptional teamwork and collaboration.

Awarded by: National Committee

Innovation Prize

2023

Honored for groundbreaking research and development.

Awarded by: Technology Council

Community Impact Award

2023

Recognized for positive contributions to the community.

Awarded by: Local Government

Rising Star Award
